title: Book an online appointment end to end
description: A logged-in client can select a category, service, professional, available slot, add notes, and submit a booking successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Switch to a week with available time slots
Verify the booking success page is displayed
Verify the appointment request success state is visible

title: Block double booking of an already selected slot
description: A client cannot book a time slot that is no longer available after it has been selected or reserved in the flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Switch to a week with available time slots
Try to select the same time slot again
Verify the slot is no longer available for booking
Verify a booking confirmation is not shown

title: Log in as an admin and reach the admin area
description: An admin can submit valid credentials and be taken into the admin experience after login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin area is displayed
Verify admin dashboard navigation is available

title: Prevent booking a taken slot
description: A client cannot book a time slot that is no longer available after it has already been selected in the current booking flow.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Choose an available future time slot
Fill in appointment notes with valid details
Start a new booking for the same service and professional
Open the previously used time slot picker
Verify the previously selected slot is no longer available

title: Log in as a client and reach the client area
description: A client can submit valid credentials and be taken into the client experience after login.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the client area is displayed
Verify client booking or appointment navigation is available

title: Register a new client account
description: A new client can complete registration and be taken into the client booking flow.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a unique client name
Fill in the email field with a unique client email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the phone field with a phone number
Verify the client booking flow is displayed
Verify the account creation success state is visible

title: Protect client routes from unauthenticated access
description: A visitor who is not logged in cannot access the client booking area and is routed to authentication instead.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed
Verify client-only content is not visible

title: Filter appointments and confirm a pending appointment
description: This verifies that an admin can locate appointments through filters and change a pending appointment to confirmed from its detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Verify the appointment status changes to confirmed

title: Protect admin routes from client access
description: An authenticated client cannot open the admin dashboard and is kept out of admin-only content.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify admin-only content is not visible
Verify access is restricted to the client area

title: Protect the client catalog from unauthenticated access
description: A visitor who is not signed in is routed to login before reaching the client catalog.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed

title: Change an appointment status from the admin list
description: An admin can open an appointment and move it from pending to confirmed or rejected, or from confirmed to completed or no-show.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an appointment in the list
Change the appointment status to a valid next state
Verify the updated appointment status is displayed
Verify the appointment remains accessible in the admin list

title: Create a confirmed appointment for an existing client from the calendar
description: This verifies that an admin can book a valid open slot for an existing client and see the new appointment created as confirmed.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Verify the appointment is created as confirmed

title: Create a confirmed appointment and a new client together from the calendar
description: This verifies that an admin can create a new client during booking and immediately place that client into a confirmed appointment.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Create a new client and appointment together
Fill in the new client details
Verify the new client and the confirmed appointment are created

title: Cancel an appointment with a reason from the admin detail view
description: This verifies that an admin can cancel an active appointment with a reason and see the updated canceled state.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Open a pending or confirmed appointment detail
Verify the appointment status changes to canceled

title: Client cancels an appointment successfully
description: A logged-in client can cancel an eligible appointment with a reason and see it move into canceled history.

steps.description: Fill in the client username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the client password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an eligible appointment for cancellation
Fill in the cancellation reason field with a change of plans
Verify the appointment appears in the canceled history

title: Cancel a client appointment with a reason
description: A client can cancel a pending or confirmed appointment by providing a reason and see it move to canceled history.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a pending or confirmed appointment
Fill in a cancellation reason with valid details
Verify the appointment appears in canceled history

title: Reject a pending appointment with a reason
description: This verifies that an admin can reject a pending appointment and provide a reason that is reflected in the updated status.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Verify the appointment status changes to rejected

title: View appointments by status and cancel with a reason
description: A client can filter appointments by status, cancel a pending or confirmed appointment with a reason, and see it move to canceled history.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select the pending or confirmed appointments view
Verify the appointment appears in canceled history
Verify the appointment is no longer shown in the active status view

title: Create an appointment from the admin calendar
description: An admin can use the weekly calendar to create a confirmed appointment for an existing or new client.
category: Admin calendar availability and appointment creation

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a confirmed appointment for an existing or new client
Verify the new confirmed appointment appears on the calendar

title: Create a bookable service with professional assignments
description: An admin can create a new online-bookable service, assign professionals, and see it added as active and bookable.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the services and categories section
Create a new service with category, duration, price, and description
Verify the service appears in the list as active and bookable

title: Review dashboard metrics and open appointment management
description: An admin can view dashboard metrics and navigate into appointment management from the dashboard.
category: Admin dashboard metrics and quick actions

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the appointments management view from the dashboard

title: Client reviews appointments by status filter
description: A logged-in client can open the appointments page and switch between status filters to see the matching appointment groups.

steps.description: Fill in the client username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the client password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the matching appointment sections are displayed

title: Review admin dashboard metrics and open appointments
description: An admin can view dashboard metrics and drill into the appointments area from the dashboard.
category: Admin dashboard metrics and quick actions

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the appointments management view is displayed

title: Review weekly availability and filter by category service and professional
description: This verifies that an admin can narrow the calendar to a specific service setup and move between weeks while seeing availability and occupied slots update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Verify the calendar displays availability and occupied slots for the selected setup

title: Create a client account from the catalog
description: An admin can add a new client with required details and see the client appear in the client catalog.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Click the link to the client catalog
Fill in the name field with a new client name
Fill in the email field with a new client email
Fill in the phone field with a new client phone number
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the new client appears in the catalog

title: Admin reviews dashboard metrics and refreshes data
description: An admin can open the dashboard, review operational metrics and upcoming appointments, and refresh the view to keep it current.

steps.description: Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Edit client profile details
description: A client can update profile information and see the saved changes reflected in the profile page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the profile name to a new valid name
Update any other editable profile detail
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify the profile save confirmation is visible

title: Client sees cancellation reason required
description: A logged-in client cannot cancel an eligible appointment until a cancellation reason is provided.

steps.description: Fill in the client username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the client password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an eligible appointment for cancellation
Submit the cancellation without entering a reason
Verify a cancellation reason validation error is visible

title: Mark a confirmed appointment as completed or no-show
description: This verifies that an admin can close out a confirmed appointment using a valid final status from the detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Mark the appointment as completed or no-show
Verify the appointment status updates to the selected final state

title: Admin opens filtered appointments from a metric card
description: An admin can drill from the dashboard into the appointments area with the corresponding filter already applied.

steps.description: Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the appointments list is displayed with a matching filter applied

title: View client appointments by status
description: A client can open the appointments page and review bookings grouped or filtered by status.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify appointments matching the selected status are displayed

title: Client updates profile details
description: A logged-in client can edit their name and phone number and see the saved profile information reflected on the page.

steps.description: Fill in the client username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the client password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Enter edit mode for the profile
Fill in the full name field with Test Client Updated
Fill in the phone number field with a valid phone number
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: Edit a client profile and keep the changes
description: An admin can update a client's name or phone details and see the edited profile reflected in the catalog or detail view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Click the link to the client catalog
Update the name or phone field with a new value
Verify the updated client profile is shown

title: Manage clients and view history
description: An admin can open the client catalog, inspect a client record, and view that client's appointment history.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the client's appointment history is displayed

title: Configure a service and assign it to a professional
description: An admin can manage services, mark them as online-bookable, and assign them to a compatible professional.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create or open a service within a category
Enable online booking for the service
Assign the service to a professional
Verify the service appears as available for online booking
Verify the professional assignment is displayed

title: Admin follows quick actions from the dashboard
description: An admin can use dashboard quick actions to open key operational areas such as calendar, clients, or configuration pages.

steps.description: Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a quick action from the dashboard
Verify the target management area is displayed

title: Disable online booking when evaluation is required
description: An admin can edit a service to require evaluation and see online booking disabled for that service.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the services and categories section
Enable evaluation required for the service
Verify online booking is disabled for that service

title: Search or sort clients and review appointment history
description: An admin can find a client through search or sorting and open the client's history to review appointment records.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Click the link to the client catalog
Use search or sorting to find a client
Verify appointment history records are displayed

title: Create and update an availability block
description: This verifies that an admin can create an availability block, edit it, and see the updated block details saved in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Create a new availability block with a type, start, end, and reason
Verify the updated block appears in the list

title: Create a weekly business hour entry
description: An admin can choose a professional, add a weekly working hour range, and see it added to the schedule.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a business hour entry with a day and time range
Verify the working hour appears in the schedule

title: Admin opens configuration area from an alert
description: An admin can use a dashboard configuration alert to navigate directly to the related management screen.

steps.description: Fill in the admin username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the related management area is displayed

title: Create a professional
description: An admin can add a new professional and see the professional appear in the catalog.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a new professional with contact details
Verify the new professional appears in the catalog

title: Set business hours and create an availability block
description: An admin can configure business hours, add an availability block, and see the blocked period reflected in scheduling views.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update business hours for a professional
Verify the updated business hours are displayed
Verify the availability block is displayed

title: Update a professional's service assignments
description: An admin can edit a professional and save updated service assignments.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Assign selected services or all services
Verify the professional-service assignments are updated

title: Browse public home page and treatment categories
description: A public visitor can view the home page, browse treatment categories, and open a category page to learn about available treatments.

steps.description: Click the link to browse a treatment category
Verify a treatment category page is displayed
Verify public treatment information is visible

title: Create a service category
description: An admin can add a new service category and see it appear in the categories list.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the services and categories section
Create a new service category with required details
Verify the new category appears in the categories list

title: Deactivate a client and restore access later
description: An admin can deactivate a client and then reactivate the same client so the client returns to active use.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Click the link to the client catalog
Verify the client is shown as active again

title: Reset calendar filters to return to the default availability view
description: This verifies that an admin can clear calendar filters and return to the default weekly availability view.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Verify the calendar returns to the default availability view

title: Edit and restore a business hour
description: An admin can edit a business hour, deactivate it, and reactivate it so the schedule remains available again.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit an existing business hour time range
Verify the updated schedule is available again

title: Search and filter the service list
description: An admin can search, filter, or sort services and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the login field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the services and categories section
Search, filter, or sort the service list
Verify the service list updates to match the selected search or filter
